title: Viridian House
handler_summary: Recover Mara Venn from a twelve-floor apartment building that indexes withheld speech. The Audience Before turns observation into audience pressure. Floor 13 and Apartment 13F open after lies under camera, not after lore dumps.
operator_brief: A missing streamer is still posting from a floor that does not exist. The building has twelve legal floors. The elevator has begun offering thirteen.
central_question: What happens to a place where everyone edits themselves before being seen?

site.location: Viridian House apartment building, Kansas City
site.ordinary_read: Tired brick, twelve floors, old lobby tile, unreliable elevator, basement laundry that smells faintly of ozone.
site.wrong_read: The building indexes withheld speech. Comments arrive before anyone types. The elevator display skips from 11 to 12, pauses, then briefly shows 13.
site.safe_first_tell: The elevator display skips from 11 to 12, pauses, then briefly shows 13.
site.what_the_site_wants: The moment before confession, when someone edits themselves to survive being seen.
what_makes_it_worse: Mockery, spectacle, or recording for leverage
Abandoning someone to be watched alone
Treating Mara as content instead of a person
what_stabilizes_it: One honest sentence spoken while another Operator protects the speaker from audience pressure
Step outside, look at each other, name one normal thing, or correct a lie before escalating
Cut the broadcast, ground Mara with a true memory, name what the performance costs

pressure_loop.need: The moment before confession, when someone edits themselves to survive being seen.
pressure_loop.lure: Comments that understand too much, footage from impossible angles, and doors offering easier selves.
pressure_loop.pressure: It predicts, captions, and redirects behavior until Operators start performing for it.
pressure_loop.gift: It reveals what someone is hiding, including the clue they cannot admit they already noticed.
pressure_loop.violence: It assigns roles, locks people inside performed selves, and turns audience attention into environmental force.
pressure_loop.exit: Honest speech under observation, protected by the group, directed toward Mara or the room instead of the audience.

core_clues.clue: Mara entered the elevator at 2:13 a.m.
core_clues.first_route: Security office timestamp on the lobby feed.
core_clues.alternate_route: Saffi remembers the lobby chime and Mara leaving alone.
core_clues.failure_cost: The footage loops an Operator into frame as if they were present at 2:13.
core_clues.table_effect: Clue is gained, but the Audience Before can target that Operator through any active screen once this scene.

core_clues.clue: Mara's reflection stayed behind in the lobby glass.
core_clues.first_route: Camera still from the security office.
core_clues.alternate_route: Lobby mirror or elevator door reflection during a second pass.
core_clues.failure_cost: The reflection mouths one Operator's private phrase before anyone speaks it aloud.
core_clues.table_effect: Clue is gained; that Operator's next social roll under observation is TN 15 instead of TN 12.

core_clues.clue: Floor 13 appears after a lie under observation.
core_clues.first_route: Manager denial while the elevator camera is active, then test the panel.
core_clues.alternate_route: Read the future comment thread in the security office.
core_clues.failure_cost: The elevator opens to Floor 13 at Tick 3 instead of Tick 4. Operators arrive with only two core clues. One hallway exit is already locked.
core_clues.table_effect: Floor 13 becomes reachable; Clock ticks; first action on Floor 13 is TN 15 under audience pressure.

core_clues.first_route: Hallway doors on Floor 13 show curated versions of the Operators.
core_clues.alternate_route: Mara's stream archive in Saffi's apartment.
core_clues.failure_cost: One Operator sees their easier self behind a door and must choose whether to approach it or warn the group.
core_clues.table_effect: Route to 13F opens; accepting the easier self ticks the Clock once.

core_clues.clue: Mara can be reached by honest speech while recorded.
core_clues.first_route: Saffi's memory of Mara saying 'say it while watched.'
core_clues.alternate_route: Live comment prompt that demands confession before the door unlocks.
core_clues.failure_cost: The audience asks the question first; the Operator who answers gains the clue but loses 1 Stability unless another Operator shields them.
core_clues.table_effect: Apartment 13F door unlocks after honest speech while recorded, or remains locked until someone pays that cost.

clock.name: Camera Notices
clock.visible_change: One device tracks the quietest Operator and keeps the light on them.
clock.mechanical_effect: That Operator's next roll under observation has Disadvantage unless another Operator stands between them and the lens.
changed_options: step out of frame together
name one normal thing aloud
send someone else to speak first
break or cover the camera and move pressure to the elevator

clock.name: Comment Predicts
clock.visible_change: A comment thread describes the next likely choice before anyone types.
clock.mechanical_effect: If the predicted action happens, the site learns one Operator's preferred mask and can echo it on the next screen.
changed_options: do the opposite of the prediction
confess a smaller true thing to poison the thread
let another Operator take the predicted action
disconnect devices and lose one alternate clue route

clock.name: Elevator Listens
clock.visible_change: The elevator repeats a sentence an Operator avoided saying.
clock.mechanical_effect: The next elevator action is TN 15 instead of TN 12 unless someone speaks honestly while recorded.
changed_options: confess a small operational truth
force the elevator and accept a Clock tick
leave and seek the security office route
ask another Operator to shield the speaker

clock.name: Floor 13 Opens
clock.visible_change: The impossible floor becomes reachable; one exit on Floor 13 is already locked.
clock.mechanical_effect: Operators need at least three core clues or they arrive with worse positioning: first Floor 13 action at TN 15.
changed_options: push forward with incomplete context
retreat to Saffi for one more clue
speak honestly to unlock one hallway exit
split the group and accept separated positioning

clock.name: Audience Edits
clock.visible_change: A performed self becomes physically persuasive on a door, screen, or reflection.
clock.mechanical_effect: One Operator gains Advantage on one performance roll if they accept the role; all non-performance rolls take Disadvantage until the role is refused aloud.
changed_options: refuse the role in front of the group
accept the role for one action and tick the Clock
name Mara as a person instead of content
cut power to the nearest broadcast surface

clock.name: Performed Self Stabilizes
clock.visible_change: The Audience Before offers one Operator a clean role and asks the others to confirm it.
clock.mechanical_effect: If confirmed, Mara or that Operator may be replaced by the easier version unless the group refuses together before the next Pressure Round ends.
changed_options: refuse the role as a group
name what the performance costs
ground Mara with Saffi's true memory
flee Floor 13 together and accept an aftermath hook

scenes.title: Act 1 — Normalization
scenes.purpose: Establish Mara as missing, the building as mundane, and observation as the first pressure.
scenes.normal_detail: Cracked tile, mailboxes, manager office window, slow elevator.
scenes.wrong_detail: The lobby camera follows the quietest Operator; the elevator button panel is warm.
scenes.entry_condition: Operators arrive after Mara's impossible post pings from inside the building.
available_clues: Mara entered the elevator at 2:13 a.m.
npc_or_site_reactions: Len Orra insists there is no thirteenth floor, then says 'not anymore.'
Saffi hears Mara's voice from the elevator and refuses to look.
The lobby camera turns away when someone tells the truth.

common_actions.success: Learn Mara left alone and the building feels like it is waiting for her to go live.
common_actions.partial: Learn the fact, but the camera records which Operator pushed hardest.
common_actions.miss: Learn the fact publicly; Clock ticks once.

common_actions.action: Test whether the elevator reacts to lies under the camera
common_actions.success: The panel flickers 13 once; Operators know the route is lie-gated.
common_actions.partial: The panel flickers; the comment thread learns one avoided phrase.
common_actions.miss: The elevator opens empty and the Clock ticks.

pressure_moves: A phone shows a comment before its owner unlocks it.
Len repeats 'there is no thirteenth floor' with a different expression each time.
failure_costs: Footage loops an Operator into frame
Saffi becomes harder to reach emotionally
exit_conditions: Clock ticks once from a lie under observation

scenes.title: Act 2 — Resonance
scenes.purpose: Make emotional answers change evidence and open alternate clue routes.
scenes.normal_detail: Security office monitors, basement laundry machines, Saffi's lived-in apartment.
scenes.wrong_detail: One monitor shows comments from three minutes in the future; a dryer plays Mara's unreleased draft.
scenes.entry_condition: Operators leave the lobby pursuing Mara or the elevator tell.
available_clues: Mara followed her own future comments toward Floor 13
npc_or_site_reactions: Comment text appears on blank walls.
The building Wi-Fi lists a network named after a hidden fear.

common_actions.success: Footage shows Mara stepping out while her reflection remains.
common_actions.partial: Clue gained, but the comment thread learns one Operator's preferred mask.

common_actions.action: Answer what truth would become dangerous if strangers watched you admit it
common_actions.success: The site answers with a clear clue and light Stability pressure.
common_actions.partial: Clue gained with distorted public exposure.
common_actions.miss: The site answers with a cruel edited version; Clock ticks.

pressure_moves: A hallway stretches when someone changes the subject.
A tenant door briefly becomes 13F when someone lies about why they came.
failure_costs: Elevator opens, but not where intended
exit_conditions: Operators hold at least three core clues
A screen asks an emotional question the table cannot dodge

scenes.title: Act 3 — Misfire
scenes.purpose: Turn the comment thread into a live antagonist and open Floor 13.
scenes.normal_detail: Elevator camera dome, phones in every pocket, lobby screens.
scenes.wrong_detail: Every nearby screen fills with comments from impossible accounts.
scenes.entry_condition: An Operator lies while the elevator camera is active, forces a Frequency without vulnerability, or treats the site as only technical.
available_clues: Floor 13 route opens after the thread participates
npc_or_site_reactions: Mara reacts from a delayed stream.
The thread offers one true clue inside a cruel sentence.

common_actions.roll: None; each Operator chooses a response
common_actions.success: Admit a small truth and regain 1 Stability.
common_actions.partial: Comfort another Operator and reduce their pressure.
common_actions.miss: Deny the comment and let the site gain leverage; Clock ticks.

pressure_moves: Comments describe what Operators are about to do with cruel edits.
One Operator must name which comment hurts because it is almost right.
failure_costs: Tick 5 begins immediately upon reaching Floor 13 if the group fed the thread

scenes.title: Act 4 — Observer Event
scenes.purpose: Rescue, contain, or release Mara without accepting curated selves.
scenes.normal_detail: Residential hallway, old carpet, apartment doors, ring-light glow.
scenes.wrong_detail: Doors show curated versions of someone; Mara's dead camera still broadcasts.
available_clues: Mara can be reached by honest speech while recorded
npc_or_site_reactions: The Audience Before offers each Operator an easier self.
Every spoken lie in Apartment 13F adds another locked door.

common_actions.action: Reach Mara through honest speech while recorded
common_actions.success: Mara responds as herself; one layer of broadcast strips away.
common_actions.partial: Mara responds, but the audience learns a true memory to sell back later.
common_actions.miss: Mara responds as performed content; Clock ticks and one exit locks.

common_actions.action: Refuse the easier self the Audience offers
common_actions.success: The offered role collapses for this scene.
common_actions.partial: The role falters, but returns on the next screen.
common_actions.miss: The Operator gains one action with Advantage and the Clock ticks.

pressure_moves: Mara's reflection is delayed by thirteen seconds.
The chat scrolls upward from tomorrow.
failure_costs: Mara or an Operator may be replaced by the easier version
One Operator's phone begins streaming without permission
exit_conditions: Broadcast is cut, grounded, or overloaded
Group refuses curated selves and names one cost of staying
Operators leave together without abandoning anyone in the hallway

scenes.title: Act 5 — Aftermath
scenes.purpose: Close the case with one scar and one unresolved hook.
scenes.normal_detail: Twelve floors again, tired lobby, ordinary elevator hesitation after 12.
scenes.wrong_detail: One Operator's phone receives comments from BEFORE_YOU_SAY_IT.
scenes.entry_condition: Floor 13 closes or Mara is recovered.
npc_or_site_reactions: Mara remembers one Operator saying something they never said aloud.
Len deletes the security footage, then receives it by mail.
pressure_moves: Saffi finds a video draft titled with tomorrow's date.
failure_costs: The Audience follows one Operator into a later Needlepoint
exit_conditions: Each Operator receives one scar, clue, or relationship shift

failure_states.trigger: Operators treat Mara as content or evidence.
failure_states.immediate_consequence: Mara stops responding to off-camera comfort.
failure_states.mechanical_effect: Attempts to calm, guide, or rescue Mara off-camera have Disadvantage.
changed_options: turn the camera on and risk feeding the Audience
name Mara as a person, not proof
use Saffi's true memory as an anchor
cut the broadcast and accept a harder rescue roll
failure_states.aftermath_hook: Mara returns with edited memories if recovered through performance.

failure_states.immediate_consequence: The elevator opens to Floor 13 at Tick 3 instead of Tick 4.
failure_states.mechanical_effect: Operators arrive with only two core clues. First action on Floor 13 is TN 15. One hallway exit is locked.
changed_options: push forward with incomplete context
speak an honest sentence to unlock one door
break the streaming phone and move pressure into the elevator
retreat and let Saffi become exposed
failure_states.aftermath_hook: The building still hesitates after 12 even if Mara returns.

failure_states.trigger: Operators feed the comment thread for spectacle.
failure_states.immediate_consequence: Tick 5 begins immediately when they reach Floor 13.
failure_states.mechanical_effect: A performed self is already active on arrival; one Operator starts with Disadvantage on non-performance rolls.
changed_options: refuse the assigned role as a group
sacrifice privacy to poison the thread with a true confession
extract Mara fast and accept a public residue hook
abandon Floor 13 and contain the residue in the lobby
failure_states.aftermath_hook: The Audience escapes into a public feed.

success_states.label: Mara Returns
success_states.table_meaning: Mara is alive, hoarse, and furious that part of her still wants to check the comments.
success_states.aftermath_hook: Viridian House stabilizes to twelve floors, but one device still predicts useful lies.

success_states.label: Building Remembers
success_states.table_meaning: The site is stable for now, but tenants dream of a hallway with too many doors.
success_states.aftermath_hook: A future Needlepoint can reopen observation residue through ordinary rental life.

aftermath: One Operator's phone occasionally receives comments from BEFORE_YOU_SAY_IT.
Mara remembers one Operator saying something they never said aloud.
Saffi finds a video draft titled with tomorrow's date.

unseen.residue: A comment arrives before anyone types it.
unseen.follows_home: One phone briefly predicts harmless phrasing.

noticed.residue: Screens hesitate before showing the Operator's reflection.
noticed.consequence: First lie under observation has Disadvantage unless shielded.

focused.residue: The comment thread knows an Operator's preferred mask.
focused.follows_home: BEFORE_YOU_SAY_IT may persist after the case.
focused.consequence: Once per scene, screen pressure can ask what the Operator is performing.

targeted.residue: The Audience targets one Operator through devices.
targeted.follows_home: Their phone receives comments near meaningful lies.
targeted.consequence: Refusal costs 1 Stability or ticks the Clock.

exposed.residue: The Audience escapes the site boundary.
exposed.follows_home: Public feed, witness, or device becomes a new access point.
exposed.consequence: Aftermath hook becomes a future Needlepoint seed.

clock_attention_consequences.consequence: Minor tell only. No penalty; warning only.
First lie under observation has Disadvantage unless shielded.
Lobby camera tracks the quietest Operator; first lie under observation has Disadvantage unless shielded.
Once per scene, screen pressure may ask what the Operator is performing.
Once per scene, the Audience may target an Operator through any active screen. Refusal costs 1 Stability or ticks the Clock.
The Audience targets one Operator through devices. Refusal costs 1 Stability or ticks the Clock.
Audience Before offers a clean role; group refusal required or Mara or an Operator may be replaced.
The Audience escapes the site boundary. Aftermath becomes a future Needlepoint seed.

Stable.case_consequence: Viridian House is still just a building. Cameras notice, but the group can choose ordinary routes.

Echoed.case_consequence: The feed answers before anyone admits the truth. A comment, camera, or reflection repeats the almost-said thing.

Recursive.case_consequence: The building starts routing choices through performance. Floor 13 feels plausible before it is reachable.

Breached.case_consequence: Apartment 13F can preserve the easier self. Mara, Saffi, or an Operator is pressured to become content.

Collapse.case_consequence: The Audience Before can stabilize a performed identity unless honest speech is witnessed and protected.

collapse_staging.broken_law: The performed body becomes easier to maintain than the living one.
collapse_staging.operator_choice: Refuse the curated self, ground Mara as a person, protect Saffi's true memory, or flee Floor 13 together.
collapse_staging.exit_condition: Honest speech under observation, protected by the group, directed toward Mara or the room instead of the audience.

Body.broken_law: The performed body becomes easier to maintain than the living one.
Body.operator_choice: Refuse the curated self, ground Mara as a person, protect Saffi's true memory, or flee Floor 13 together.
Body.exit_condition: Honest speech under observation, protected by the group, directed toward Mara or the room instead of the audience.

Name.broken_law: The audience's name for someone becomes easier to answer to than their own.
Name.operator_choice: Speak the real name, reject the captioned name, or let the label stabilize.
Name.exit_condition: Someone who knows the person speaks the real name while another Operator shields them from attention.

Identity.broken_law: The curated self becomes easier to recognize than the living person.
Identity.operator_choice: Refuse the performed identity, name what it costs, or let the Audience stabilize the easier version.
Identity.exit_condition: Someone protects honest speech while the Operator names who they are without performing for the room.

Role.broken_law: The assigned role becomes more stable than the person.
Role.operator_choice: Refuse the useful role, redefine it, or embody it and accept cost.
Role.exit_condition: Someone interacts with the person instead of the function: friend, witness, victim, streamer, monster, handler, content.

Memory.broken_law: The edited memory becomes easier to replay than the original.
Memory.operator_choice: Trust Saffi, trust evidence, trust the feed, or reconstruct the event together.
Memory.exit_condition: A witness names the original truth and pays the cost.

Relationship.broken_law: The audience relationship replaces the private bond.
Relationship.operator_choice: Protect Saffi/Mara as people, or perform care for the feed.
Relationship.exit_condition: A private truth is spoken while watched, without making it content.

Evidence.broken_law: The useful proof becomes more real than the true proof.
Evidence.operator_choice: Preserve the ugly evidence, duplicate it, or let the feed curate it.
Evidence.exit_condition: Secure a clue before the feed edits it.

Time.operator_choice: Act before the caption resolves, wait for the audience, or break sequence.
Time.exit_condition: Interrupt the predicted action with a protected honest choice.

Signal.broken_law: The feed becomes the room's nervous system.
Signal.operator_choice: Cut the broadcast, speak into it, corrupt it, or let it choose.
Signal.exit_condition: Broadcast route is severed, redirected toward the room, or made private.

Room.broken_law: The site accepts the performance as architecture.
Room.operator_choice: Leave, anchor the room, bargain with it, or let 13F stabilize.
Room.exit_condition: The group exits together after naming what the room is preserving.

Record.broken_law: The recorded version becomes more credible than the witnessed truth.
Record.operator_choice: Preserve the ugly record, duplicate the contradiction, or let the feed clean the story.
Record.exit_condition: A clue is secured before the feed edits it, and another Operator witnesses the uncorrected version.

Location.broken_law: The building routes people toward the floor where their edited selves are easier to keep.
Location.operator_choice: Follow Floor 13, mark verified architecture, or leave together before the route accepts the lie.
Location.exit_condition: The group uses a mundane route, confirms it together, and refuses the elevator's offered version.

History.broken_law: The cleaner backstory becomes easier to remember than the messy truth.
History.operator_choice: Let Mara remain content, reconstruct her as a person, or preserve the version that hurts.
History.exit_condition: Saffi's true memory or another grounded witness restores the cost of the performance.

rewrite_staging.rewrite_law: The accepted name becomes easier to remember than the original.
rewrite_staging.lock_in_risk: If no one contradicts it before the next pressure beat, update the affected record.
rewrite_staging.counteraction_window: A witness says the original name and accepts being seen.

Name.rewrite_law: The accepted name becomes easier to remember than the original.
Name.lock_in_risk: If no one contradicts it before the next pressure beat, update the affected record.
Name.counteraction_window: A witness says the original name and accepts being seen.

Identity.rewrite_law: The Audience-backed identity becomes the stable self.
Identity.lock_in_risk: Future rooms, feeds, and witnesses respond to the performed version first.
Identity.counteraction_window: Refuse one useful lie and keep a chosen flaw visible.

Role.rewrite_law: The useful role becomes the stable identity.
Role.lock_in_risk: The character gains advantage while performing it, but loses access to unsupported selfhood.
Role.counteraction_window: Someone asks for the person, not the performance.

Memory.rewrite_law: The repeated version overwrites the witnessed version.
Memory.lock_in_risk: Future clues point to the edited event unless duplicated proof exists.
Memory.counteraction_window: Three independent records or witnesses reconstruct the true event.

Relationship.lock_in_risk: The audience can speak through the relationship.
Relationship.counteraction_window: The bond-holder names a private truth the audience cannot use.

Record.rewrite_law: Platform, landlord, camera, or police records begin agreeing with the edited version.
Record.lock_in_risk: The contradiction disappears unless duplicated before the next pressure beat.
Record.counteraction_window: Copy the record, compare witnesses, and preserve one ugly inconsistency.

Body.rewrite_law: The body adapts to the version most safely witnessed.
Body.lock_in_risk: The physical tell persists after exit.
Body.counteraction_window: Grounding, touch, medical proof, or self-naming interrupts the shift.

Location.rewrite_law: Floor 13 becomes easier to reach than the legal building.
Location.lock_in_risk: The site treats 13F as the true location and begins routing exits through it.
Location.counteraction_window: Mark a verified route, leave together, and refuse symbolic shortcuts.

History.rewrite_law: Mara's public persona becomes the remembered history.
History.lock_in_risk: NPCs remember the performance as consent.
History.counteraction_window: A witness names the private truth without improving it.

player_view.safe_consequence: The room responds visibly when watched choices become honest, hidden, or performed.

handler_prompts: FIRST 20 MIN: Start in the lobby. Show the camera before explaining anything. Ask what detail made each Operator come anyway.
When Len or Saffi speaks, let the camera answer the first lie, deflection, or honest admission.
Default Room Answer: lobby camera tracks the quietest Operator.
Ask once per screen scene: What truth would become dangerous if strangers watched you admit it?
If the table stalls in Act 1, give Saffi the memory that the building felt like it was waiting for Mara to go live.
Do not block progress if Operators jump ahead; let them reach Floor 13 with worse positioning instead.
Closing line: The haunting did not end because you solved it. It changed because you stopped performing long enough for reality to hear you.

effects.consequence: Camera tracks the quietest Operator; next lie under observation has Disadvantage.
Floor 13 can open early; next elevator action TN 15 unless honest speech while recorded.

effects.npc_pressure_note: Targeted by observation; next lure vector.

effects.consequence: One door unlocks or next consequence softens.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Mara stops responding off-camera; rescue attempts have Disadvantage.

table_triggers.label: Misfire disturbs site
table_triggers.hint: Viridian House gets worse before the feed reacts.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Primary Clock (site-owned): the building answers through cameras, doors, or elevator timing.

table_triggers.label: Misfire exposes Operator
table_triggers.hint: The audience learns a person instead of a location.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Attention Clock: the feed now has a cleaner read on one Operator.

table_triggers.label: Mirrored contact
table_triggers.hint: Camera lens, phone screen, elevator panel, or performed self answers back.

table_triggers.label: Evidence decay
table_triggers.hint: Clip, comment, memory, witness, or route changes before it is secured.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Case Clock: evidence changes before the Operators can secure it.

table_triggers.label: Severe misfire / natural 3
table_triggers.hint: Tick both, or tick the immediate clock twice.

effects.consequence: Severe misfire: tick both, or let the immediate threat advance twice.

table_triggers.label: Accept curated / easier self
table_triggers.hint: Operator accepts the performed role or curated version on Floor 13.

effects.consequence: The accepted self stabilizes; overwrite may lock in unless contradicted.
